---
title: "The Autobiography and Correspondence of Mary Granville, Mrs. Delany, with interesting reminiscences of King George the Third and Queen Charlotte Edited by Lady Llanover."
---

## The Autobiography and Correspondence of Mary Granville, Mrs. Delany, with interesting reminiscences of King George the Third and Queen Charlotte Edited by Lady Llanover.

**Author:** Mary Delany
**Date:** 1861-2
**Imprint:** London: Bentley

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
